name: Hawaiian Flours Lemon Poppy Seed Sour Cream Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. In a large bowl, combine all dry ingredients: bread flour, all purpose flour, lemon cake mix, whole wheat flour, gluten flour, sugar, yeast, oil, and poppy seeds. Mix well.
3. Add the egg, sour cream, water (1 cup), and liquid (3 tbsp lemon juice) to the dry ingredients. Stir until a dough forms.
4. Pour the batter into the bread machine pan and add any additional water as needed.
5. Follow the bread machine's settings for the specific type of bread you are making.
6. When baking is complete, allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
